74843.subject: рҹҗ¶рҹ“° Weekend Update
74843.body:
**BTC** $63,608 (1.8%) | **ETH** $1,726 (2.0%) | **SOL** $72 (4.8%)

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

Welcome to the Daily Bone Weekend Update where we recap the top stories from the  week. Be sure to check out our daily newsletter to get all of your news hot off the press each and every weekday!

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

### Headlines

* US Hormuz blockade ended after [deal with Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067589619055554595) was signed

* Fed held rates steady and omitted forward guidance at Warsh's [first meeting](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067307283919581688) вҖ” Odds of a July [rate hike](https://polymarket.com/event/fed-decision-in-july-181) increased to 25%

* STRC fell[ as low as $82](https://x.com/Croesus_BTC/status/2067643944016486751?s=20) before recovering back over $88 вҖ” ==Saylor admitted to using AI to develop ==[STRC](https://x.com/CoinDesk/status/2067670392911667278)

* BinanceвҖҷs MiCA [license is in jeopardy](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066884038791762199?s=20) and the exchange could lose permission to serve EU clients

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

### TradFi

* ==Rockstar opens pre-orders for ==[GTA 6](https://x.com/RockstarGames/status/2067594067030979053)== on June 25==

* ==Intel gained ==[14%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/INTC)== on rumors of Apple chip deal==

* ==CME group announced plans to ====[sue the CFTC](https://x.com/fintechfrank/status/2067422497998315931?s=20)==== over regulation of perpetual futures==

* SpaceX briefly [flipped Microsoft](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2066884086174458063?s=20) to become 4th largest public company by market cap before pulling back вҖ” SpaceX to [acquire Cursor](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2066844381504561211?s=20) coding platform for $60B

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

### Crypto

* Franklin Templeton filedfor ETF that reinvests [stock dividends into BTC](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2067909471435685965?s=20)

* SBF told prison inmate that he will [launch a token](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067063631012139258?s=20) when he gets out of jail

* HYPE ETFs have now recorded [$153M in net inflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066656817913250232?s=20) вҖ” HYPE hit a [new ATH of $77](https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/trade/HYPE) on Wednesday

* Strategy [added $100M BTC](https://x.com/saylor/status/2066491610863419722?s=20) and $100M cash reserves

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

### AI

* AI image and video generation company Midjourney revealed [full body medical scanner](https://x.com/midjourney/status/2067421950314688759?s=20)

* ==Coinbase launched SEC-registered ====[AI investment advisors](https://x.com/coinbase/status/2066969129110630667)==

* ==White House demanded that Fable 5 be ====[impossible to jailbreak](https://x.com/Polymarket/status/2067357928206594261?s=20)==== before re-release вҖ” Anthropic CEO said companies testing Mythos liken it to a ====[super weapon](https://x.com/Polyma

74842.subject: The best film and television of 2026 (so far)
74842.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvJE8NGtGneJsC13A0sb9ONQNBz3bIzpefKEJJDOw9JGUYj2pPEiLH7H97gRUYqD-D9PwNbfp-Iba1YJG11CXDtJFz3e_3TgRlI1_kuzDA 

June 20th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist This Weekend

 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvJE8NGz-MC205rXrSHRip-XK0Hhaos4H4QqqPm6_Qj2dM1qfbsVXkUDUqaHHEIVJrXFhajsRA0SYi_JvPVhYaGdy9GzrM_Z4J5d9ezqIg 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvJE8NG0yBD5AYrP4rhwPv_JXhYfmQ3mNwhgX0d7vl2s_f2wZWJMGTsgtA4Qsp_xwZqX_zRyHtyzD_L7NyO7ONmhXc8FatJVNdAoq3BfNA 



https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvJE8NG1QL-JTNjanK2QdGFUMt_kzmvmoiHVmVCsMF63RIFp0DvVl6UxK9WEnCb-shqU-IT4Jm5Lf2YwG_FiNMCuR2YFRuMUqtIP 

Video: Timo Lenzen



Rachel Lloyd

Deputy culture editor



A few weeks ago I had an unexpected experience at the cinema. I went into “The Sheep Detectives” expecting it to be a lighthearted, silly yarn: Hugh Jackman, after all, was playing shepherd to a flock of computer-generated sheep. Yet Craig Mazin’s script was anything but woolly. The film was funny and surprisingly profound as it explored belonging, grief and the bond between animals and humans. It made me think of “Bambi”, “Up”, “Coco” and other children’s films that grapple with the heavy theme of loss. 


Little wonder, then, that &ldqu

VyzdvihnГәЕҘ> Platia zmluvnГ© podmienky Ponuka platГӯ iba na strГЎnke akcie вҖҠ вҖҠ вҖҠ вҖҠ вҖҠ вҖҠ Sledujte nГЎs POZNГҒMKA: Toto je automaticky vygenerovanГҪ e-mail, neodpovedajte naЕҲ. Adresa kancelГЎrie: First Floor, 25 St Stephens Green, Dublin 2, Ireland В UpozorЕҲujeme, Еҫe na tejto adrese sa vrГЎtenie tovaru neprijГӯma.

>>>>>>>>> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a
>>>>>>>>> ked Ano, ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?

>>>>>>>>> РҝРёСҲРө:
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> ZdravГӯme nevestuрҹ’ҚрҹӨҚ,
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> ДҺakujeme veДҫmi pekne za vaЕЎu sprГЎvu.. TermГӯn svadby mГЎme eЕЎte
>>>>>>>>>> voДҫnГҪ a veДҫmi radi budeme sГәДҚasЕҘou vaЕЎej svadby.рҹӨҚ
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretГЎvame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kГәsok od KoЕЎГӯc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladaЕҘ svadobnГә
>>>>>>>>>> vГҪzdobu a na zГЎklade toho vytvoriЕҘ cenovГә ponuku na mieru pre vГЎs ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali zГЎujem prosГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas kedy by vГЎm to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa ДҚasovo radi prispГҙsobГӯme vГЎЕЎmu ДҚasu. PoprГӯpade, ak sme mimo KoЕЎГӯc ДҚi
>>>>>>>>>> PreЕЎova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. ProsГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorГҪ by VГЎm vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez vГӯkend aj vo veДҚernГҪch
>>>>>>>>>> hodinГЎch. рҹҷӮ NajbliЕҫsie voДҫne termГӯny mГЎme eЕЎte aj tento tГҪЕҫdeЕҲ. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret

>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> ZdravГӯme nevestuрҹ’ҚрҹӨҚ,
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> ДҺakujeme veДҫmi pekne za vaЕЎu sprГЎvu.. TermГӯn svadby mГЎme eЕЎte voДҫnГҪ
>>>>>>>> a veДҫmi radi budeme sГәДҚasЕҘou vaЕЎej svadby.рҹӨҚ
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretГЎvame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kГәsok od KoЕЎГӯc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladaЕҘ svadobnГә
>>>>>>>> vГҪzdobu a na zГЎklade toho vytvoriЕҘ cenovГә ponuku na mieru pre vГЎs ak by ste
>>>>>>>> mali zГЎujem prosГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas kedy by vГЎm to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>> aby sa ДҚasovo radi prispГҙsobГӯme vГЎЕЎmu ДҚasu. PoprГӯpade, ak sme mimo KoЕЎГӯc ДҚi
>>>>>>>> PreЕЎova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. ProsГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas,
>>>>>>>> ktorГҪ by VГЎm vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez vГӯkend aj vo veДҚernГҪch
>>>>>>>> hodinГЎch. рҹҷӮ NajbliЕҫsie voДҫne termГӯny mГЎme eЕЎte aj tento tГҪЕҫdeЕҲ. Forme
>>>>>>>> stretnutia sa radi prispГҙsobГӯme VГЎm, ДҚo je pre VГЎs praktickejЕЎie вҳәпёҸ
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Budeme sa teЕЎiЕҘ na prГӯpadnГә spoluprГЎcu s Vami.
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Lenka Gattiker,
>>>>>>>> VaЕЎa osobnГЎ posh asistentka
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>
